title: bench experiment manifest
description: Defines a 3-way comparison experiment: tasks run under each information-regime mode. Consumed by the bench-orchestration skill; the measurement tool (compare.py) reads the resulting cells.

experiment.description: Experiment id; also the dir name under .coding-agent/bench/.

modes.description: Mode ids to run (e.g. A_cks, B_code_only, C_code_skills). Cells = tasks x modes.

mode_agents.description: mode id -> the ANALYSIS/PLANNING/DESIGN agent for that mode.

shared_agents.description: Agents shared by every mode (implement, evaluate).

ticket.description: path to a ticket.json (the work item)

module.description: primary go-stablenet module under test (consensus|txpool|systemcontracts|state|miner|...). For coverage tracking; avoids single-module bias.

base_commit.description: go-stablenet commit the cell branch is cut from. For a known-fixed bug, set this to the bug's PARENT commit so the defect is actually present; else the task is trivially satisfied. Defaults to the current go_stablenet_root HEAD.

oracle.description: Correctness oracle hints (e.g. which chainbench test must pass).

go_stablenet_root.description: absolute path to the go-stablenet repo under test

max_eval_cycles.description: Bug-cycle ceiling per cell: EVALUATION_FAIL re-plans up to this many times before BLOCKED (bench-orchestration §4.4 step e).
